content.claim: Under Nkt. §50(8), each state-run tankerületi központ (school district center) defines and publishes mandatory-admission catchment boundaries (felvételi körzet) per settlement annually; villages without their own school are assigned to a designated neighboring primary school.
content.context: The unavoidable contraction of rural primary school provision in Hungary must be managed through transparent, locally-led merger and maintainer-change mechanisms that prioritize pupil welfare, transport safety, and informed parental consent, rather than through top-down administrative consolidation that disconnects school governance from community voice and decision-making.
limitations: The v1 source string was not re-verified during migration.
content.population: Population described in the migrated claim
content.time_scope: As reported in the v1 source corpus
